title: Rustpilot surface (project_state)
summary: Surface plan for project state, operational control, and agent collaboration.

pages.title: System Overview
pages.purpose: Primary dashboard for observing system state, agent activity, and dispatching work.

actions.title: Send to UI Agent
actions.description: Request page design changes, structure adjustments, or UI evolution.

actions.title: Send to Concierge
actions.description: Turn natural-language requests into structured system work.

actions.title: Send to Reviewer
actions.description: Collect blockers, failures, and optimization suggestions.

notes: All sections and sources backed by ui.status protocol.
All actions use ui.wire.dispatch protocol with valid targets (ui, concierge, reviewer).
Process tree and launches sections preserved per backend contract.
Chat contracts (main_friend, group_chat, agent_details) included as first-class data sources.
